EXPLANATION: The paper is confirmed real and found on the ACM Digital Library (dl.acm.org/doi/10.1145/2827872) with the exact title "The MovieLens Datasets: History and Context" and authors F. Maxwell Harper and Joseph A. Konstan — exactly matching the cited reference. The automated checker's "3 correct authors" appears to be a metadata parsing artifact (splitting "J. A." as a separate entry), not a genuine third author.
LINK: https://dl.acm.org/doi/10.1145/2827872
FOUND_TITLE: The MovieLens Datasets: History and Context
FOUND_AUTHORS: F. Maxwell Harper, Joseph A. Konstan
FOUND_YEAR: 2015
VERDICT: UNLIKELY
